description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a dark metallic finish accented by red and blue highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and display a striking red pattern, with winglets at the tips for aerodynamic efficiency. Twin jet engines are mounted on pylons above the wings, each with a prominent red intake and blue exhaust detailing. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, with a faceted canopy and visible window frames. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers extending beyond the main fuselage. The overall design suggests a futuristic or advanced tactical aircraft, optimized for speed and maneuverability.
description: A futuristic, dark metallic airplane with swept-back wings, twin jet engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit accented by red and blue highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the twin jet engines flanking the fuselage with red intakes and blue exhausts.
description_view_1: Top view reveals the full wingspan with red patterns, winglets, and the compact tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the blue engine exhausts, the angular tail section, and the symmetry of the swept-back wings.
description_view_3: Side view displays the elongated nose, cockpit placement, engine mounting above the wings, and the streamlined profile of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings, prominent winglets, and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings on pylons.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers extending beyond the fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a nose gear, partially visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy and single-seat configuration.
